summary: Reference pack for lifting, shoring, hoisting and jacking diagrams. These assets support ground handling and maintenance-familiarization study; 3D model content remains separate in Technical Lab.

references.locator: Aircraft General chapter 7 — lifting and shoring

components.name: Hoisting points and slings
components.description: Figures identify sling arrangements and hoisting references for aircraft, fuselage, wing, stabilizer, engine and propeller handling.

components.name: Jacking points
components.description: Jacking references cover nose fuselage, undercarriage/strut, rear fuselage and rear lifting point locations used for ground support operations.
